items.title_en: Stocks making the biggest moves premarket: Applied Materials, Intel, Magnum Ice Cream and more
items.title_zh: 盘前涨幅最大的股票：应用材料公司、英特尔、Magnum Ice Cream 等
items.desc_en: These are the stocks posting the largest moves premarket.
items.desc_zh: 这些是盘前涨幅最大的股票。

items.title_en: Trump says he will soon make decision about sanctions on Chinese companies buying Iranian oil
items.title_zh: 特朗普表示，他将很快就制裁购买伊朗石油的中国公司做出决定
items.desc_en: U.S. President Donald Trump said Friday that he will make a decision over the next few days about lifting sanctions on Chinese oil companies that buy Iranion oil.
items.desc_zh: 美国总统特朗普周五表示，他将在未来几天内就解除对购买伊朗石油的中国石油公司的制裁做出决定。

items.title_en: Why Britain’s potential next PM is putting investors on edge
items.title_zh: 为什么英国潜在的下一任首相让投资者感到紧张
items.desc_en: Traders fear a new left-leaning U.K. government led by Andy Burnham would challenge the country's fiscal discipline.
items.desc_zh: 交易员担心安迪·伯纳姆领导的新左倾英国政府将挑战该国的财政纪律。

items.title_en: Trump and Xi conclude 'very successful' talks but no deals announced
items.title_zh: 特朗普和习近平结束“非常成功”的会谈，但没有宣布任何协议
items.desc_en: There were plenty of choreographed ceremonies but no trade breakthroughs after the two-day visit.
items.desc_zh: 两天的访问之后，双方精心设计了很多仪式，但贸易上并没有取得突破。

items.title_en: This trucking stock has lagged of late. Citi thinks a rebound is coming
items.title_zh: 该货运股最近表现落后。花旗认为反弹即将到来
items.desc_en: The bank upgraded the transport stock to buy from neutral.
items.desc_zh: 该银行将运输股的评级从“中性”上调至“买入”。

items.title_en: Bill Ackman says he built Microsoft position in first quarter
items.title_zh: 比尔·阿克曼表示，他在第一季度奠定了微软的地位
items.desc_en: Bill Ackman's Pershing Square Capital Management has built a position in Microsoft, the billionaire hedge fund manager said Friday in a post on X.
items.desc_zh: 亿万富翁对冲基金经理比尔·阿克曼 (Bill Ackman) 的潘兴广场资本管理公司 (Pershing Square Capital Management) 已在微软建仓，这位亿万富翁对冲基金经理周五在 X 上发帖称。

items.title_en: Cerebras stock falls after blockbuster IPO debut — here's what's happening
items.title_zh: Cerebras 首次公开募股后股价下跌 - 这就是发生的事情
items.desc_en: Cerebras Systems' shares were lower in early trading Friday, after its blockbuster stock market debut on Thursday.
items.desc_zh: Cerebras Systems 周四在股市首次亮相后，其股价在周五早盘交易中走低。

items.title_en: Magnum Ice Cream stock soars 18% after report of potential private equity takeover
items.title_zh: 潜在私募股权收购消息传出后，Magnum Ice Cream 股价飙升 18%
items.desc_en: It comes just six months after Magnum Ice Cream Company spun off from Unilever to create the world's largest standalone ice cream maker.
items.desc_zh: 就在六个月前，玛格南冰淇淋公司从联合利华分拆出来，创建了世界上最大的独立冰淇淋制造商。

items.title_en: Australia court doubles payout for trans woman in landmark discrimination case

items.title_en: UAE fast tracks second West-East oil pipeline to bypass Strait of Hormuz

items.desc_en: The second pipeline project comes as global energy supplies remain under pressure and flows through the Strait of Hormuz remain severely limited

items.title_zh: 战犯拉特科·姆拉迪奇的释放请求被拒绝
items.desc_en: A UN judge admits the 84-year-old is "in the final stages of his life", but says prison conditions in The Hague ensure his maximum comfort.
items.desc_zh: 一名联合国法官承认这位 84 岁的老人“正处于生命的最后阶段”，但表示海牙的监狱条件确保了他最大的舒适度。

items.title_en: Giant new dinosaur identified from fossils in Thailand
items.title_zh: 泰国从化石中鉴定出巨型新恐龙
items.desc_en: The nagatitan is the largest dinosaur found in South-East Asia and weighs as much as nine elephants.
items.desc_zh: 纳加泰坦是东南亚发现的最大恐龙，体重相当于九头大象。

items.title_zh: Autograph.video Beta
items.desc_en: A drag and drop Motion Design tool to swap creatives quickly
items.desc_zh: 用于快速交换创意的拖放运动设计工具

items.title_en: Ukraine says Russia launches "massive and virtually nonstop" strikes on Kyiv, killing at least 12 - CBS News
items.title_zh: 乌克兰称俄罗斯对基辅发动“大规模且几乎不间断”的袭击，造成至少 12 人死亡 - 哥伦比亚广播公司新闻
items.desc_en: Ukraine says Russia launches "massive and virtually nonstop" strikes on Kyiv, killing at least 12  CBS NewsRussian Offensive Campaign Assessment, May 14, 2026  Institute for the Study of WarAt least 2
items.desc_zh: 乌克兰称俄罗斯对基辅发动“大规模且几乎不间断”的袭击，造成至少 12 人死亡 CBS 新闻俄罗斯进攻战役评估，2026 年 5 月 14 日战争研究所至少 2 人

items.title_zh: Planora
items.desc_en: A digital workspace for creative collaboration
items.desc_zh: 用于创意协作的数字工作空间

items.desc_en: Auto-redact sensitive info from Mac screenshots
items.desc_zh: 自动编辑 Mac 屏幕截图中的敏感信息

items.title_en: Warning of record global temperatures as chance of very strong El Niño grows
items.title_zh: 强烈厄尔尼诺现象的可能性增加，全球气温将创历史新高
items.desc_en: As El Niño develops this year, scientists are increasingly confident it could be one of the strongest on record with global consequences, as Simon King explains.
items.desc_zh: 正如西蒙·金（Simon King）解释的那样，随着今年厄尔尼诺现象的发展，科学家们越来越有信心它可能是有记录以来最强烈的厄尔尼诺现象之一，并对全球产生影响。

items.title_en: 'Floating armoury' ship reportedly seized by Iran
items.title_zh: 据报道伊朗扣押了“浮动军械库”船
items.desc_en: A vessel said to be a “floating armoury” in the Gulf of Oman has been seized by Iranian military personnel, according to reports.
items.desc_zh: 据报道，一艘据称是阿曼湾“浮动军械库”的船只已被伊朗军事人员扣押。

items.title_en: Mantel
items.title_zh: Mantel
items.desc_en: Stop confusing your Claude Code sessions & terminal windows
items.desc_zh: 停止混淆您的克劳德代码会话和终端窗口

items.title_en: Former Nigerian minister sentenced to 75 years in rare corruption verdict
items.title_zh: 尼日利亚前部长因罕见腐败案被判 75 年徒刑
items.desc_en: Former Power Minister Saleh Mamman was convicted last week - but the authorities do not know his whereabouts.
items.desc_zh: 前电力部长萨利赫·马曼上周被定罪，但当局不知道他的下落。

items.title_en: Latvian PM resigns after row over stray Ukrainian drones
items.title_zh: 拉脱维亚总理因乌克兰无人机失控而辞职
items.desc_en: Drones bound for Russia crashed down in Latvia last week, prompting a political fallout.
items.desc_zh: 上周，飞往俄罗斯的无人机在拉脱维亚坠毁，引发了政治影响。

items.title_en: Cuba has run out of diesel and oil, energy minister says
items.title_zh: 古巴能源部长称柴油和石油已耗尽
items.desc_en: The minister says the situation in Cuba is "extremely tense", as a US-led blockade of oil to the country causes widespread power cuts.
items.desc_zh: 这位部长表示，古巴的局势“极其紧张”，因为美国主导的对该国石油封锁导致大范围断电。

items.title_en: DevRecorder
items.title_zh: DevRecorder
items.desc_en: Screen recorder with console, network, errors & annotations
items.desc_zh: 带有控制台、网络、错误和注释的屏幕录像机

items.title_en: Massive Russian strikes across Ukraine leave one dead, officials say
items.title_zh: 官员称，俄罗斯对乌克兰发动大规模袭击，造成一人死亡
items.desc_en: Rescuers are searching for survivors in the rubble of a residential building hit overnight in Kyiv.
items.desc_zh: 救援人员正在基辅一栋夜间遭受袭击的住宅楼废墟中寻找幸存者。

items.title_zh: PromptScout
items.desc_en: Track your brand visibility across AI models
items.desc_zh: 跨 AI 模型跟踪您的品牌知名度

items.title_en: Standboy
items.title_zh: Standboy
items.desc_en: A Game Boy that wakes up while your agent works
items.desc_zh: 一个在你的代理工作时醒来的 Game Boy

items.title_en: HMRC to use AI from British tech firm to spot fraud and tax return errors
items.title_zh: 英国税务海关总署将使用英国科技公司的人工智能来发现欺诈和纳税申报错误
items.desc_en: Quantexa, a financial data platform, won the £175m contract to spot fraud and tax return errors.
items.desc_zh: 金融数据平台 Quantexa 赢得了价值 1.75 亿英镑的合同，以发现欺诈和纳税申报错误。

items.title_en: WhatsApp launches totally private 'incognito' conversations with its AI chatbot
items.title_zh: WhatsApp 与其人工智能聊天机器人推出完全私密的“隐身”对话
items.desc_en: A cyber security expert says deleting chat history could lead to a lack of accountability if things go wrong.
items.desc_zh: 一位网络安全专家表示，如果出现问题，删除聊天记录可能会导致缺乏责任感。

items.title_en: Suicide forum fined £950,000 for not blocking UK users
items.title_zh: 自杀论坛因未屏蔽英国用户而被罚款 95 万英镑
items.desc_en: The regulator said the forum had not done enough to protect UK users - but critics accuse Ofcom of acting too slowly.
items.desc_zh: 该监管机构表示，该论坛在保护英国用户方面做得不够，但批评者指责 Ofcom 行动太慢。

items.title_en: Thousands of Waymo robotaxis recalled over risk of entering flooded roads
items.title_zh: 数千辆 Waymo 机器人出租车因存在进入被洪水淹没的道路的风险而被召回
items.desc_en: The voluntary recall follows an incident on 20 April where an empty Waymo car entered a flooded road in San Antonio, Texas.
items.desc_zh: 此次自愿召回是在 4 月 20 日发生的一起事件之后发生的，当时一辆空的 Waymo 汽车进入德克萨斯州圣安东尼奥市一条被洪水淹没的道路。

items.desc_zh: 使用基于插件的开源运行时构建编码代理

items.title_zh: Crustimate
items.desc_en: Fix your LinkedIn to get found by AI recruiters
items.desc_zh: 修复您的 LinkedIn，让 AI 招聘人员找到您

items.title_en: More than 70 million warnings sent to people seeking child abuse material
items.title_zh: 向寻求虐待儿童材料的人们发出了超过 7000 万条警告
items.desc_en: The messages highlight the illegality of what people are searching for online and direct them towards help.
items.desc_zh: 这些消息强调人们在网上搜索的内容是非法的，并引导他们寻求帮助。

items.title_en: Smart glasses are 'an invasion of privacy' - Meta's are selling better than ever
items.title_zh: 智能眼镜“侵犯隐私”——Meta 的销量比以往任何时候都好
items.desc_en: The biggest tech firms are set to sell millions of smart glasses despite growing privacy concerns.
items.desc_zh: 尽管隐私问题日益严重，但最大的科技公司仍将销售数百万副智能眼镜。

items.title_en: Tech Life
items.title_zh: 科技生活
items.desc_en: Crumbling roads and other hazards - can AI make our streets safer?
items.desc_zh: 摇摇欲坠的道路和其他危险——人工智能能让我们的街道更安全吗？

items.title_en: Sam Altman: Elon Musk wanted control of OpenAI even after death
items.title_zh: 山姆·奥尔特曼：埃隆·马斯克死后仍想控制 OpenAI
items.desc_en: Sam Altman said Elon Musk tried many times for total control of OpenAI, which he's now suing.
items.desc_zh: 山姆·奥尔特曼表示，埃隆·马斯克曾多次尝试完全控制 OpenAI，目前他正在起诉 OpenAI。

items.title_en: Canvas hack: company pays criminals to delete students' stolen data
items.title_zh: Canvas 黑客：公司付钱给犯罪分子，让他们删除学生被盗的数据
items.desc_en: The company behind Canvas says it has "reached an agreement" with the hackers who disrupted thousands of colleges and universities.
items.desc_zh: Canvas 背后的公司表示，它已经与扰乱数千所学院和大学的黑客“达成协议”。

items.title_en: Texas accuses Netflix of spying on users, including children
items.title_zh: 德克萨斯州指控 Netflix 监视用户，包括儿童
items.desc_en: The lawsuit comes amid increased scrutiny over platform features like auto-play that deliver endless content to users.
items.desc_zh: 此次诉讼发生之际，人们对自动播放等向用户提供无尽内容的平台功能进行了越来越严格的审查。
